name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo card holder. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic blue leather. The 2024 Early Spring collection reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci lettering, cleverly showcasing the brand's identity. This card holder features four card slots, showcasing the craftsmanship of the design. Black leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo, four card slots.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ Gucci logo card holder. The men's daily accessories collection is reimagined with classic blue leather. Model: 771157.
Dimensions: 7cm (L) x 10cm (W)
Color: Blue/Original leather.
